items.summary: I first slipped on Halliday's original smart glasses at CES 2025. I was not a fan. The glasses had a tiny, movable display window embedded into the frame that was incredibly finicky to see, and my 30-minute demo left me with achy eyeballs. It was an interesting concept with terrible execution,…

items.summary: 中國深圳地鐵突然實施更嚴格的安檢新規，有當地居民向BBC中文質疑新規效率及保安實際成效。據報，深圳地鐵指僅負責落實，措施不會長期持續。新規正值APEC峰會舉行前4個月執行。
items.title: APEC前夕四個月，中國深圳地鐵突加強安檢惹民怨
